title: Quiet Hybrid Spectrum Fly Zapper Electric Fly Killer Fly Catcher Fruit Fly Trap Bug Zapper for Home Indoor Insect Mosquito Killer Lamp - UK Plug
bullet_points: 【💤More Quiet】50% zapping noise reduction compared to other traditional capacitor fly zappers. Quieter, pet and child friendly.

【⚡More Powerful】Next generation power drive module generates and maintains a constant 4200V zapping output. Higher bug killing rate compared to other fly killer (capacitor type) that can only generate interval zapping.

【🌈Broader Spectrum】Hybrid regular UV and black UV dual bulbs emit a broader spectrum of light, which is more effective in attracting bugs. (Black UV light spectrum is largely invisible to human eyes, only partially visible in total darkness). And there are 2 extra packs bulbs included for free.(The tubes are consumable items, replacement every 6 months is recommended).

【👶Better Safety】Insulated ABS shell is safer than metal shell which risks electricity leakage. Our next generation power drive consistently discharges low current but maintains high voltage when zapping bugs. It's safer than traditional fly catchers that instantly discharge high current and voltage, which can be dangerous.

【💀No Chemicals】The 20W electric fly trap plug in is designed to use wild light spectrum to attract flying insects such as flies, fruit flies, gnats, moths and mosquitos. The device uses a transformer to generate high voltage to charge the internal metal grid, which electrocutes the pests when touched. No chemical baits or sprays are used. Plays excellent role as a fly zapper, fly killer, fly catcher indoor, fruit fly trap, bug zapper, insect killer.
